nasb.text: and Obed-edom with his 68 relatives; Obed-edom, also the son of Jeduthun, and Hosah as gatekeepers.

esv.text: and also Obed-edom and his sixty-eight brothers, while Obed-edom, the son of Jeduthun, and Hosah were to be gatekeepers.

cnv.text: 又留下俄別．以東和他們的親族六十八人，以及耶杜頓的兒子俄別．以東和何薩作守門的。

ccb.text: 又派俄别·以东及其六十八位亲族、何萨和耶杜顿的儿子俄别·以东守门；
